final_prompt.prompt:
Create a fantasy illustration of a dragon and knight battle scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a fantasy aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs an epic, dynamic framing — exact camera angle and motion lines are yours
Subject: must include a dragon breathing fire, a knight charging with shield
Scene/backdrop: must include a burning castle and a lightning-filled sky
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, intense atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
